description: In her previous life, she was Okazaki Kanami, homeroom teacher to the kids who were reincarnated, and they affectionately call her "Oka-chan." After reincarnating, she began attending school with [Shun](https://anilist.co/character/130487/Schlain-Zagan-Analeit) and the others as their classmate. Since she reincarnated as an elf, she looks younger than she actually is. She's a caring teacher who continues to follow her students after their reincarnation, but she has many secrets.

name: Gamakichi
description: Gamakichi is one of Gamabunta's children. He was first summoned by Naruto Uzumaki because Naruto couldn't focus his chakra during the beginning of the battle with Gaara. However, he is intelligent enough to be aware of the situation around him and realize when it's time to flee.

name: Himari Noihara
description: She is also called The Crimson Blade. Himari is a cat demon that played with Yuuto during his childhood when he stayed at his grandparents house. She can change her form from human to cat, even halfway, having a human body but with cat ears and tail. One of Himari's ancestors were spared by an Amakawa demon slayer, and so the ancestors and the descendants serve the Amakawa family. Himari has loved Yuuto since his childhood and she often flirts with him. Himari was sad when his parents took Yuuto

name: Hotaru Mizushina
description: Hotaru is Yuma's childhood and best friend. Yuma was always around to protect her from various things such as bullying at school, but over time she has changed and even ended up having many boyfriends (though Yuma noticed she seemed uninterested).

description: A member of the Masked Fools. Inscrutable and unscrupulous. A dangerous maestro of theatrics, utterly engrossed in the art of performance. name: Lucario
description: Lucario is a bipedal, canine-like Pokémon, with fur that is predominantly blue and black. name: Marii Buratei
description: The substantial protagonist of the manga, who has long red hair. She behaves like an Edokko and speaks in a masculine tone of Edo speech, but she is actually from Tokushima Prefecture. She acts tsukkomi and often says "Don't ask a trifling question! (Tsuman'nē koto Kiku na yo!?)" Her name is a pun on Bloody Mary.
